## Summary

- HPAI Peak appears to have been overcome
- There are still cases in wild birds throughout Germany at a low level
- Number of cases in poultry are at a low level
- Situation is under control, no chains of infection
- However risk assessment FLI (06/02/2026) still results in high risk

https://www.fli.de/en/news/animal-disease-situation/avian-influenza-ai-fowl-plague/

- Conclusion: Awareness and biosecurity still of high importance

<!-- image -->
